query:
UPDATE business_branches SET
               name       = COALESCE($1, name),
               latitude   = COALESCE($2, latitude),
               longitude  = COALESCE($3, longitude),
               ward_id    = COALESCE($4, ward_id),
               phone      = COALESCE($5, phone),
               address    = COALESCE($6, address),
               updated_at = NOW()
           WHERE id = $7
